news.title:
Vardhman Textiles starts commercial production at Baddi with 15 lakh meters/month capacity.
Capex plan from May 2024 is progressing, focusing on technical textiles expansion.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles starts commercial production at Baddi with 15 lakh meters/month capacity.
Capex plan from May 2024 is progressing, focusing on technical textiles expansion.

news.title:
Bangladesh's zero-duty access to the US for select garments may impact Indian cotton and yarn exports, triggering focus on textile stocks.
Integrated players like KPR Mill and Vardhman Textiles are better positioned to handle competitive pressures; initial impact seen as sentiment-driven.
news.summary:
Bangladesh's zero-duty access to the US for select garments may impact Indian cotton and yarn exports, triggering focus on textile stocks.
Integrated players like KPR Mill and Vardhman Textiles are better positioned to handle competitive pressures; initial impact seen as sentiment-driven.

news.title:
Textile stocks like Gokaldas, Welspun, Vardhman, and Trident in focus ahead of Budget 2026 for potential policy support.
Sector seeks measures to boost competitiveness, protect MSME jobs, and leverage FTAs with EU and UK for export growth.
news.summary:
Textile stocks like Gokaldas, Welspun, Vardhman, and Trident in focus ahead of Budget 2026 for potential policy support.
Sector seeks measures to boost competitiveness, protect MSME jobs, and leverage FTAs with EU and UK for export growth.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles sees limited near-term visibility but optimistic for global trade stabilization.
Management highlights integrated capabilities and diversified customer base as key differentiators.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles sees limited near-term visibility but optimistic for global trade stabilization.
Management highlights integrated capabilities and diversified customer base as key differentiators.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles plans to double garment division capacity in 8 months post-start.
The project timeline for capacity expansion is approximately eight months.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles plans to double garment division capacity in 8 months post-start.
The project timeline for capacity expansion is approximately eight months.

news.title: Vardhman Textile's Q3 revenue rose to ₹25.05B from ₹24.6B YoY.
news.summary: Vardhman Textile's Q3 revenue rose to ₹25.05B from ₹24.6B YoY.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles to hold board meeting on 15 Jan 2026.
Agenda includes approval of Q3 and nine-month unaudited financials.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles to hold board meeting on 15 Jan 2026.
Agenda includes approval of Q3 and nine-month unaudited financials.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles invests Rs. 9.1 crore in Sone Solar Energy for a 19.5% stake.
The 30 MWac solar plant in Punjab had an initial Rs. 5.1 crore investment on Dec 12, 2025.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles invests Rs. 9.1 crore in Sone Solar Energy for a 19.5% stake.
The 30 MWac solar plant in Punjab had an initial Rs. 5.1 crore investment on Dec 12, 2025.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles approves acquisition of 19.5% stake in a solar energy firm.
The 30 MW solar plant is for captive use; acquisition cost is Rs. 9.1 crore.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles approves acquisition of 19.5% stake in a solar energy firm.
The 30 MW solar plant is for captive use; acquisition cost is Rs. 9.1 crore.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles foresees Q3/Q4 challenges due to export focus but notes optimism from US trade talks.
Cotton crop output estimated at 31M bales, per concall update.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles foresees Q3/Q4 challenges due to export focus but notes optimism from US trade talks.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles forecasts market stabilization by Q4 FY26.
Synthetic fabric plant aims for 20-30% utilization in Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles forecasts market stabilization by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles released Q2 FY26 results conference call audio.
Call held on 23rd Oct 2025; link available on company website.
news.summary:

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles plans Rs.3,535 Cr capex for 30% capacity expansion.
The expansion is targeted for completion by FY26 end.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles plans Rs.3,535 Cr capex for 30% capacity expansion.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles reported Q2 FY26 results, achieving $1B turnover.
Largest yarn producer with 1.25M spindles; aims net zero emissions by 2045.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles reported Q2 FY26 results, achieving $1B turnover.
Largest yarn producer with 1.25M spindles; aims net zero emissions by 2045.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles posts Q2 EBITDA of ₹3.32B, up from ₹3.15B YoY.
EBITDA margin improves to 13.8%, compared to 12.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Vardhman Textiles posts Q2 EBITDA of ₹3.32B, up from ₹3.15B YoY.
EBITDA margin improves to 13.8%, compared to 12.8% YoY.

news.title:
HUL, Colgate, Laurus Labs, Fabtech Tech among firms announcing Q2 results today.
Other firms include Vardhman Textiles, Tata Teleservices, Sagar Cements, PTC India Financial Services.
news.summary:
HUL, Colgate, Laurus Labs, Fabtech Tech among firms announcing Q2 results today.

news.title:
Vardhman Textiles board to review unaudited financial results for Q2/H1 FY25 on Oct 23.
Meeting complies with SEBI Regulation 29; results pertain to quarter ended Sept 30, 2025.
news.summary:
